info.title: MBW.Tools.ElephantProject
info.description: .NET global tool to create and maintain solution files spanning multiple repositories.

commands.name: rewrite
commands.description: Rewrite project files, replacing package references

options.name: root-dir
options.description: Root directory to search in, defaults to the working directory

options.name: include
options.description: Rewrite all projects that match these glob patterns, can be specified multiple times

options.name: exclude
options.description: Exclude all projects matching these glob patterns, can be specified multiple times

commands.name: undo-rewrite
commands.description: Undo rewrite of project files, replacing package references

options.name: root-dir
options.description: Root directory to search in, defaults to the working directory

options.name: include
options.description: Rewrite all projects that match these glob patterns, can be specified multiple times

options.description: Exclude all projects matching these glob patterns, can be specified multiple times

options.name: root-dir
options.description: Alters the root directory for globbing operations, defaults to the working directory

options.name: file-types
options.description: File types to include in the solution, example: '.csproj,.fsproj'

options.description: Include all projects that match these glob patterns, can be specified multiple times
